frontend_build.timeout_policy: Python process group wrapper; npm ci timeout 120s, npm run build timeout 180s, SIGTERM then SIGKILL

check_all.result: fast + benchmark + audit + frontend metadata; frontend build intentionally excluded

known_design_decision: check_all.sh intentionally excludes frontend build because isolated frontend build is safer than chaining Next.js build after backend pytest jobs in this runtime.
frontend_build_chain_observation: When frontend build was chained after long backend pytest jobs, this runtime sometimes held the process after successful build output. The stable policy is to run scripts/check_frontend_build.sh as a separate job.
